subcategory : "Instances"

# ovh_cloud_flavor

Use this data source to retrieve information about a flavor available in a public cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_flavor" "flavor" {
  service_name = <Public cloud project id>
  id           = "<flavor id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Flavor ID
- `service_name` (String) Service name of the resource representing the id of the cloud project

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Flavor description
- `disk` (Number) Root disk size (GB)
- `ephemeral` (Number) Ephemeral disk size (GB)
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the flavor is publicly available to the project
- `name` (String) Flavor name
- `ram` (Number) Amount of RAM (MB)
- `region` (String) Region where the flavor is offered
- `swap` (Number) Swap size (MB)
- `vcpus` (Number) Number of virtual CPUs
